MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TARA GHIMIRE's MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS is GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, along with complete production, due no later than September 13, 2024, unless otherwise agreed by the parties. Monetary sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $1,704.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.
